summary: Confidence history feature verified end-to-end. Backend POST /api/confidence returns {ok:true} and GET /api/confidence/history returns array with user_id, value, created_at. Dashboard renders sparkline (data-testid=confidence-sparkline) with label 'Your crystal is brightening' and no runtime errors.
passed: GET /api/confidence/history -> 200, array of rows with user_id, value, created_at
/dashboard loads with mode-tag, no console/page errors
data-testid=confidence-sparkline visible with 'Your crystal is brightening' label and latest value 6/10
